title: Stocks Fall as US-Iran Jitters Spur Rally in Oil: Markets Wrap
title_cn: 由于美国和伊朗的紧张局势刺激石油价格上涨，股市下跌：市场结束
summary: A flare-up in geopolitical risks sent stocks and bonds lower as oil jumped after President Donald Trump said a ceasefire with Iran may be over, adding the US would probably launch further strikes.

title: Hyperscaler Debt Is Now a Rates Story
title_cn: 超大规模债务现在已成为利率问题
summary: When so much supply hits the market.

title: SpaceX Has 'Tremendous' Earnings Power, Say Clear Street Analysts
title_cn: Clear Street 分析师称 SpaceX 拥有“巨大”的盈利能力
summary: Brian Dobson, managing director & senior analyst, and Greg Pendy, director & equity analyst, at Clear Street discuss their buy rating on SpaceX and say that they're looking at the rocket business as a 'placeholder' for other growing parts of the business like Starlink or xAI.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Accor to Tap Banks for Hoxton Owner Ennismore’s US IPO
title_cn: 雅高集团将为 Hoxton 所有者 Ennismore 的美国 IPO 寻找银行
summary: Accor SA has lined up investment banks to arrange a potential US initial public offering of Ennismore Lifestyle Group Ltd., according to people familiar with the matter, as the French hotel group presses on with plans to spin out the unit.

title: Long-Term Linear Valuation Not Promising: Lee
title_cn: 长期线性估值没有希望：Lee
summary: Grace Lee, partner & managing director and co-lead of the media & entertainment practice at Alix Partners, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." They discuss media dealmaking as executives descended this week on Sun Valley, Idaho, for the Allen & Co. annual gathering of media, technology and finance moguls.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Treasury Two-Year Yield Near 2026 High in Global Bond Selloff
title_cn: 全球债券抛售导致两年期国债收益率接近 2026 年高点
summary: The two-year US Treasury yield climbed back toward last month’s peak amid a selloff in global bond markets as rising oil prices rekindled worries about inflation.

title: Torrid Pace for Deals: Paul Weiss's Veeraraghavan
title_cn: 火爆的交易节奏：Paul Weiss 的 Veeraraghavan
summary:
Krishna Veeraraghavan, global co-head of M&A at Paul Weiss, joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." They discuss the current pace of M&A deals, capital coming back into public markets, and AI continuing to drive deal activity. 
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: US Stocks Pare Iran War-Driven Losses as Dip Buyers Emerge
title_cn: 由于买家出现下跌，美国股市削减了伊朗战争造成的损失
summary: US equities nearly erased earlier losses that were driven by fears of US-Iran war escalation that pushed energy prices higher.

title: Top India Asset Manager Sets Price Range for $1.22 Billion IPO
title_cn: 印度顶级资产管理公司设定 12.2 亿美元 IPO 价格范围
summary: SBI Funds Management Ltd.’s biggest investors are seeking to raise as much as 116.9 billion rupees ($1.22 billion) in what’s expected to be India’s first billion-dollar IPO of the year.

title: Los Angeles Hospital Blames Covid, Lender Dispute for Bankruptcy
title_cn: 洛杉矶医院将破产归咎于新冠疫情和贷方纠纷
summary: Pacifica Hospital of the Valley, which serves poor and homeless residents in Los Angeles, filed for bankruptcy, blaming old financial problems linked to the Covid-19 pandemic and a more recent dispute with lenders.

title: Zillow, Rocket to Face August FTC Trial Over Rental Listings
title_cn: Zillow 和 Rocket 将面临联邦贸易委员会 (FTC) 八月份的租赁清单审判
summary: Zillow Group Inc. and Rocket Companies Inc.’s Redfin are headed to trial next month in the US Federal Trade Commission’s challenge to an apartment-listing partnership, after a judge in Virginia declined a government request to decide the case early.

title: Oil Soars as Trump Says Iran Truce Over, More Strikes Ahead
title_cn: 特朗普表示伊朗休战结束，未来将有更多袭击，油价飙升
summary: Oil jumped to a two-week high after the US renewed attacks on Iran and President Donald Trump said an interim peace deal is over, heightening concerns about the free flow of crude from one of the world’s most important energy-producing regions.

title: Gold Drops on Rate-Hike Fears as Trump Says Iran Ceasefire Over
title_cn: 特朗普称伊朗停火结束，金价因加息担忧而下跌
summary: Gold dropped as US President Donald Trump said the ceasefire with Iran has ended, stoking concerns that a renewal of fighting could again drive inflation and push up interest rates.

title: Strait of Hormuz Is Iran's 'New Nuclear Weapon' Says Miller
title_cn: 米勒称霍尔木兹海峡是伊朗的“新核武器”
summary: Aaron David Miller, senior fellow at Carnegie Endowment for International Peace, joined Balance of Power to discuss the recent escalation in the Middle East. He said Iran will go to "extreme lengths" to ensure it exercises some control over the Strait of Hormuz. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: China Adds to US Soy Buying With Largest Daily Deal Since 2025
title_cn: 中国增加美国大豆购买量，创下2025年以来最大单日交易量
summary: China purchased the largest amount of US soybeans since November, extending a wave of buying as agricultural trade between the world’s two largest economies gathers pace.

title: Brazil Energy Firm Origem Is Said to Seek $2.5 Billion Valuation
title_cn: 巴西能源公司 Origem 寻求 25 亿美元估值
summary: Origem Energia SA, the Brazilian natural gas and oil company, is aiming for an enterprise value of $2 billion to $2.5 billion as it seeks strategic alternatives to raise capital, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Blackstone’s QTS Taps US Loan Market in Data Center-Backed Deal
title_cn: Blackstone 的 QTS 通过数据中心支持的交易进军美国贷款市场
summary: QTS Realty Trust LLC is seeking to raise $2 billion to repay debt tied to US data centers and pay dividends to Blackstone Inc.

title: Record-High US Fuel Exports Are Straining Domestic Stockpiles
title_cn: 美国燃料出口创历史新高令国内库存紧张
summary: Unprecedented overseas demand for US diesel, propane and other fuels is straining commercial reserves from the Gulf Coast to the Eastern Seaboard as the US-Iran conflict reintensifies, pushing energy prices higher.

title: Shipowners Wrestle With Hormuz Risks as US-Iran Deal Crumbles
title_cn: 美伊协议破裂，船东面临霍尔木兹海峡风险
summary: Shipowners painted a mixed picture of their willingness to continue transiting the Strait of Hormuz in the hours after President Donald Trump said the US ceasefire with Iran is “over.”

title: UK Carpet Firm Victoria Inks Deal With Left-Behind Creditors
title_cn: 英国地毯公司维多利亚与落后债权人达成协议
summary: UK carpet maker Victoria Plc and a group of bondholders left behind in an earlier debt deal have struck an agreement over a balance sheet restructuring.

title: EM Assets Slide as Trump Threatens Iran Strikes, New Blockade
title_cn: 特朗普威胁打击伊朗和新封锁，新兴市场资产下滑
summary: Emerging-market assets sank Wednesday after the US renewed strikes on Iran and threatened to reimpose a blockade on its oil, pushing the price of crude further up and undermining the fragile ceasefire.

title: Dollar Gets Safe-Haven Flows as US-Iran Ceasefire Under Threat
title_cn: 由于美伊停火受到威胁，美元获得避险资金流
summary: The dollar advanced for a second straight session as escalating fears of a return to full-scale war between the US and Iran prompted investors to seek shelter.

title: Saudi Efforts to Revive Gulf Oil Loadings Run Into Buyer Caution
title_cn: 沙特恢复海湾石油装载的努力遭遇买家谨慎
summary: Saudi Arabia’s attempts to revive oil flows from its reopened Ras Tanura terminal on the Persian Gulf are running into caution from customers, who are reluctant to load there because of renewed threats to shipping, according to people familiar with the matter.

title: Russia Bans Diesel Exports After Ukraine’s Refinery Attacks
title_cn: 乌克兰炼油厂遇袭后俄罗斯禁止柴油出口
summary: Russia announced a short-term ban on diesel exports, causing global prices for the fuel to surge to multi-year highs, as a wave of Ukrainian drone attacks leads to domestic shortages.

title: Brent’s Surge Runs Into Options Levels That Could Fuel Gains
title_cn: 布伦特原油价格飙升达到可能推动收益的期权水平
summary: Brent crude oil’s 8% gain on Wednesday has futures moving through levels of large open interest that could potentially add fuel to the rally.

title: Canadian Banks Too Rich After Searing 66% Run, Jefferies Says
title_cn: 杰富瑞 (Jefferies) 表示，加拿大银行在暴涨 66% 后变得太富有了
summary: Canada’s biggest bank stocks are running out of runway as valuations have fully priced in future growth, according to analysts with Jefferies Securities Inc.

title: Trump Threatens More Iran Strikes
title_cn: 特朗普威胁对伊朗发动更多袭击
summary: Leslie Vinjamuri, the President and CEO of the Chicago Council on Global Affairs joined Bloomberg Open Interest to explain why President Trump's latest Iran threats are aimed at gaining negotiating leverage rather than launching a full-scale war. She also breaks down NATO's strategy for managing Trump, why Europe is adapting its approach, and why the risk of escalation. and its impact on oil markets and the global economy, remains dangerously high. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: IMF Says AI Offsets Middle East Fallout
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织表示人工智能抵消了中东的影响
summary: The International Monetary Fund left its global growth forecast largely unchanged for this year, saying that the boom in artificial intelligence helped offset the fallout from conflict in the Middle East. Petya Koeva Brooks, Deputy Director of the IMF's Research Department, discusses the updated World Economic Outlook report on Bloomberg Open Interest. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Big Tech’s $25 Billion Mega Bond Sales Are Pushing Market Limits
title_cn: 大型科技公司 250 亿美元的巨额债券销售正在突破市场极限
summary:
Once a rare event reserved for historic mega-acquisitions, the jumbo bond sale is increasingly becoming the tech sector’s go-to financing tool.
Debt offerings of $25 billion or more have quickly shifted into a baseline for tech giants funding their artificial intelligence expansion, with Amazon.com Inc.’s sale on Tuesday marking the seventh time this year alone a technology company has reached that threshold in a single shot. 
Vishal Khanduja, Head of Broad Markets Fixed Income at Morgan Stanley Investment Management, discusses how the bond market is pricing in these offerings. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Stocks Fall as US-Iran Jitters Spur Rally in Oil
title_cn: 由于美国和伊朗的紧张局势刺激石油价格上涨，股市下跌
summary:
A flare-up in geopolitical risks drove stocks lower, bond yields rose and oil climbed as President Donald Trump said a ceasefire with Iran may be over, noting the US would probably launch further strikes.
From New York to London and Tokyo, equities retreated. Almost 400 shares in the S&P 500 dropped, though chipmakers bounced.
Sarah Hunt, Chief Market Strategist at Alpine Saxon Woods, discusses these market gyrations amid geopolitical swings. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Apple’s Chip Deal With Broadcom Expected to Top $30 Billion
title_cn: 苹果与博通的芯片交易预计将突破 300 亿美元
summary: Apple Inc., following through on a pledge to boost spending on US-made components, said its expanded agreement with Broadcom Inc. is expected to top $30 billion.

title: BofA Bankers U-Turn on OpenAI
title_cn: 美国银行银行家对 OpenAI 掉头
summary:
Bloomberg's Liana Baker joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." Bank of America handed a $520 million credit line to OpenAI in recent weeks after previously spurning the artificial intelligence giant’s request, according to people with knowledge of the matter.
. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Sonos Cuts Top Design and Product Executives as Part of Layoffs
title_cn: 作为裁员的一部分，Sonos 裁减了顶级设计和产品主管
summary: Sonos Inc. has pushed out some of its top design and product management executives as part of job cuts in recent weeks, raising questions about the company’s ability to develop breakthrough products beyond its short-term hardware road map of safe bets.

title: AI Chip Startup Raises Funds at $11B Valuation
title_cn: AI 芯片初创公司以 11B 美元估值筹集资金
summary:
Bloomberg's Ryan Gould joins Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Deals." Chip startup SambaNova has raised $1 billion at an $11 billion valuation, underscoring investors’ conviction in rising demand for infrastructure tied to artificial intelligence.
 (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Meta to Build First Data Center in Canada, Expanding Global Fleet
title_cn: Meta 将在加拿大建立第一个数据中心，扩大全球机队
summary: Meta Platforms Inc. will invest around $10 billion to build its first data center in Canada as the company expands its infrastructure to support its artificial intelligence ambitions.

title: BofA Makes U-Turn on OpenAI, Provides $520M Credit Line
title_cn: 美国银行对 OpenAI 掉头，提供 5.2 亿美元信贷额度
summary: Bank of America is changing its tune on OpenAI: after initially passing on lending to the AI company, it is now extending a $520 million credit line, according to sources. Bloomberg's Sridhar Natarajan joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Incredible Demand for Inferencing at High Speeds: SambaNova CEO
title_cn: 对高速推理的巨大需求：SambaNova 首席执行官
summary: Chip startup SambaNova raised $1 billion at an $11 billion valuation, underscoring investors’ conviction in rising demand for infrastructure tied to AI. SambaNova CEO Rodrigo Liang joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Media and AI Back in the Sun Valley Spotlight
title_cn: 媒体和人工智能重新成为太阳谷的焦点
summary: AI is top of mind at Sun Valley for the Allen & Co annual gathering of media, technology and finance moguls - with tech leaders including Tim Cook, Alex Karp, Jeff Bezos, and Bill Gates in attendance. Bloomberg's Michelle Davis joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Lerer Hippeau Seeing Second Generation of AI Startups
title_cn: Lerer Hippeau 看到第二代人工智能初创公司
summary: AI is dominating venture capital, with OpenAI, Anthropic and xAI attracting a huge share of global funding. Eric Hippeau, managing partner at Lerer Hippeau, joins Ed Ludlow on "Bloomberg Tech" to discuss what that means for startups and the broader VC market. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Jittery Tech Markets; OpenAI Gets BofA Credit Line | Bloomberg Tech 7/08/2026
title_cn: 紧张不安的科技市场； OpenAI 获得美国银行信贷额度 |彭博科技 7/08/2026
summary: Bloomberg’s Ed Ludlow breaks down mixed tech markets following US-Iran jitters, which revived risk-off sentiment and sent oil higher. Plus, OpenAI gets a $520 million credit line from Bank of America, while the ChatGPT maker prepares to roll out its most advanced model on Thursday. And, Eric Hippeau from Lerer Hippeau discusses the early stage investing landscape at a time of ballooning AI valuations. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: SpaceXAI, Cursor Unveil Grok AI Model for Coding, Finance Tasks
title_cn: SpaceXAI、Cursor 推出用于编码、财务任务的 Grok AI 模型
summary: SpaceXAI has unveiled a new artificial intelligence model built in partnership with AI coding startup Cursor that’s meant to be more adept at finance, legal and coding tasks, in a bid by Elon Musk’s firm to gain ground on rivals like Anthropic PBC and OpenAI.

title: Trump Threatens More Iran Strikes | Open Interest 7/8/2026
title_cn: 特朗普威胁对伊朗发动更多袭击未平仓合约 7/8/2026
summary: Get a jump start on the US trading day with Dani Burger on "Bloomberg Open Interest." President Trump threatens more strikes on Iran, oil jumps as tensions rise near the Strait of Hormuz, and the AI trade faces a fresh geopolitical test. Leslie Vinjamuri breaks down the risk of escalation, NATO’s Trump strategy, and the oil-market fallout. Plus, IMF’s Petya Koeva Brooks joins Open Interest on the new World Economic Outlook and how war and technology are reshaping global growth. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Microsoft’s Xbox to Shift Obsidian Studio to New ‘Fallout’ Video Game
title_cn: 微软 Xbox 将把黑曜石工作室转移到新的《辐射》视频游戏上
summary: The game maker is also canceling a planned sequel to last year’s ‘Avowed’

title: Parents’ Phone Addiction Affects Bond with Kids, New Study Finds
title_cn: 新研究发现父母的手机成瘾会影响与孩子的联系
summary: Parents’ attachment to screens and smartphones can have negative, long-lasting developmental and psychological effects on their children, according to new research.

title: China to Let AI Firms Buy Nvidia H200s, Information Says
title_cn: 有消息称，中国将允许人工智能公司购买 Nvidia H200
summary: China plans to allow top artificial intelligence companies to buy a limited amount of H200 chips from Nvidia Corp., a sign the country is easing restrictions on the coveted US technology, according to the Information.

title: Chinese AI Models Advance, Causing US Cybersecurity Anxiety
title_cn: 中国人工智能模型进步引发美国网络安全焦虑
summary: The global market for frontier artificial intelligence is evolving.

title: IMF Says AI Helps Offset War-Driven Slowdown But Sees Risks
title_cn: 国际货币基金组织表示人工智能有助于抵消战争导致的经济放缓，但也看到了风险
summary: The International Monetary Fund left its global growth forecast largely unchanged for this year, saying that the boom in artificial intelligence helped offset the fallout from the conflict in the Middle East.

title: Infrastructure Software is 'Place to Be' Amid AI Trade, Says Fatima Boolani
title_cn: 法蒂玛·布尔尼 (Fatima Boolani) 表示，基础设施软件是人工智能贸易中的“一席之地”
summary: Fatima Boolani, Co-Head of US Software Equity Research at Citi, discusses the tech selloff and why infrastructure software is so important amid the AI trade. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Steve Pagliuca Says AI, Pharma, Sports Are Key Investment Focus
title_cn: Steve Pagliuca 表示人工智能、制药、体育是重点投资焦点
summary: PagsGroup Chief Executive Officer Stephen Pagliuca sees a clutch of growing industries, including artificial intelligence and sports, as a key focus for investment over the long term.

title: Blue Owl Unveils Infrastructure Venture Catering to Data Centers
title_cn: Blue Owl 推出面向数据中心的基础设施风险投资公司
summary: Blue Owl Capital Inc. is launching a new venture geared toward the data-center boom that will develop, own and operate fiber networks that are key to the infrastructure buildout.

title: Financials Have Been 'Less Loved,' Hermann Says
title_cn: 赫尔曼表示，金融股“不太受青睐”
summary: Julia Hermann, Global Market Strategist at New York Life Investment Management, says financials have been "less loved" by the market, but she says the sector is not strapped for cash and is a high quality area of the market. She speaks on "Bloomberg Open Interest." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Former Disney Executive Named CEO of Film Distributor Fathom
title_cn: 迪士尼前高管被任命为电影发行商 Fathom 首席执行官
summary: Jason Brenek plans to release more faith-based movies and independent films

title: AI Chip Startup SambaNova Raises Funds at $11 Billion Value
title_cn: AI芯片初创公司SambaNova筹集了价值110亿美元的资金
summary: Chip startup SambaNova Systems Inc. has raised $1 billion at an $11 billion valuation, underscoring investors’ conviction in rising demand for infrastructure tied to artificial intelligence.

title: Crypto-Focused VC Firm Paradigm Raises $1.2 Billion for AI Bets
title_cn: 专注于加密货币的风险投资公司 Paradigm 为人工智能投资筹集了 12 亿美元
summary: Paradigm, the venture firm founded to invest in cryptocurrency companies, has raised a new $1.2 billion fund to make more bets outside of the sector, including artificial intelligence and robotics.

title: Mistral AI Releases Robotics Model to Support Physical AI Push
title_cn: Mistral AI 发布机器人模型支持物理 AI 推送
summary: Mistral AI announced a new robotics navigation model, as the French startup expands in the emerging field of physical artificial intelligence after signing deals with major European industrial customers.

title: Yardeni Says Inflation, Fed Back in Play on Iran Crisis
title_cn: 亚德尼称通胀、美联储在伊朗危机中发挥作用
summary: Ed Yardeni, president of Yardeni Research, says the flare-up of fighting with Iran rekindles market concern that rising oil prices will stoke inflation -- and force the Federal Reserve to hike interest rates. He speaks on Bloomberg Television's ``Surveillance.'' (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Douglas Elliman Taps Google Cloud to Revamp Brokerage Using AI
title_cn: 道格拉斯·艾丽曼 (Douglas Elliman) 利用 Google Cloud 利用人工智能改造经纪业务
summary: Luxury real estate brokerage Douglas Elliman Inc. is betting artificial intelligence can expand its business beyond buying and selling homes.

title: AI Firm Zhipu to Sell $4 Billion of Shares After 1,500% Rally
title_cn: 人工智能公司智普在股价上涨 1,500% 后将出售 40 亿美元股票
summary: Chinese artificial-intelligence model maker Zhipu is seeking to raise about $4 billion from a share sale after its stock soared almost 1,500% since a January listing in Hong Kong.

title: Samsung Sends Chip Investors on Another Roller Coaster Ride
title_cn: 三星芯片投资者再次坐过山车
summary: The company’s strong earnings fell short of an ever-rising bar for chipmakers

title: Democratic Infighting Undermines Midterms Prospects
title_cn: 民主内斗破坏中期选举前景
summary: Factional wars prevent the party from taking advantage of a discontented electorate.

title: NATO Summit Shows Trump’s Chemistry With Leaders Matters Most
title_cn: 北约峰会表明特朗普与领导人的化学反应最重要
summary: Donald Trump told NATO leaders he was feeling the love at the end of a two-day summit in Ankara.

title: OpenAI Expands Release of Top AI Model GPT-5.6
title_cn: OpenAI 扩大顶级 AI 模型 GPT-5.6 的发布
summary: OpenAI is expanding the release of its most advanced model after getting the green light from the Trump administration. GPT-5.6 will now be available globally. Bloomberg's AI editor Seth Fiegerman reports.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How Apple Will Use Broadcom Chips
title_cn: 苹果将​​如何使用博通芯片
summary: Broadcom is going to more than 15 billion chips in the US as part of an extended deal with Apple. Mark Gurman reports on how those new US-made components will be used on "Bloomberg Tech." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Platner Campaign Revs Up Maine Backers for Fight on Replacement
title_cn: 普拉特纳竞选活动动员缅因州支持者为替代斗争而奋斗
summary: Maine US Senate candidate Graham Platner’s campaign began mobilizing his supporters for a potential struggle over choosing a replacement Democratic nominee as he faces mounting pressure to drop out of the election in the wake of sexual assault allegations.

title: Fed Minutes Show ‘a Few’ Officials Saw Case for June Hike
title_cn: 美联储会议纪要显示“少数”官员认为六月份加息的理由
summary: A few Federal Reserve officials in their most recent policy meeting said there was a case for raising interest rates, though they ultimately supported the decision to leave rates on hold. Bloomberg's Tyler Kendall breaks down the Fed Minutes. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Floats Iran Strike, Blockade | Balance of Power 7/8/2026
title_cn: 特朗普提出对伊朗实施打击、封锁权力平衡 7/8/2026
summary: On the early edition of Balance of Power, Bloomberg Washington Correspondents Joe Mathieu and Kailey Leinz discuss the latest from the NATO summit in Ankara. On today's show, Carnegie Endowment Senior Fellow Aaron David Miller, Stonecourt Capital Partner Rick Davis, Harvard Kennedy School Ash Center Visiting Democracy Fellow Jeanne Sheehan Zaino and former Republican Congressman Patrick McHenry. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Maine Democrats Rule Out Platner Role in Picking Replacement
title_cn: 缅因州民主党人排除了普拉特纳在挑选继任者中的作用
summary: Maine’s Democratic Party urged Graham Platner to immediately withdraw from the race for a US Senate seat following allegations of sexual assault and vowed he would have no role in selecting his replacement. Patrick McHenry, former Republican Congressman from North Carolina, Bloomberg Contributor, former House Financial Services Committee Chairman joins to discuss.  (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Oil Wildcatters Seek a Piece of Venezuela Despite Quakes
title_cn: 尽管地震不断，石油野营者仍寻求在委内瑞拉分一杯羹
summary: Independent producers are angling for deals to tap the country's petroleum reserves – and moving faster than Big Oil.

title: Trump Says US to Remove Syria From Terrorism Sanctions List
title_cn: 特朗普称美国将把叙利亚从恐怖主义制裁名单中删除
summary: President Donald Trump said the US would remove Syria from the terrorism sanctions list as he met with the country’s president, Ahmed al-Sharaa, on the sidelines of the NATO summit.

title: Trump Says He’ll Let Ukraine Make Patriot Missiles. It Won’t Be Easy
title_cn: 特朗普表示他将允许乌克兰制造爱国者导弹。这并不容易
summary: US President Donald Trump’s suggestion on Wednesday that he would allow Ukraine — desperate for missile defenses after withering Russian strikes — to build its own Patriot interceptors won’t be easy or quick.

title: Turkey in Line to Get Six F-35 Jets If Trump Unblocks Sale
title_cn: 如果特朗普解除销售禁令，土耳其将获得六架 F-35 喷气式飞机
summary: Turkey is looking to secure the delivery of six F-35 jets from the US in an initial transaction, if President Donald Trump reverses a ban on Ankara buying the advanced fighter planes, according to Turkish officials familiar with the matter.

title: Swiss See ‘Good Chance’ for Lasting 15% Tariff Deal With US
title_cn: 瑞士认为与美国达成持久 15% 关税协议的“好机会”
summary: There is a “good chance” Switzerland will secure a lasting trade deal with the US at 15% tariff rates, according to the country’s top trade diplomat.

title: Trump Says He’ll Stop in UK to Showcase New Air Force One
title_cn: 特朗普表示他将在英国停留展示新空军一号
summary: President Donald Trump said he would send the Air Force One jet gifted by Qatar to an air base in the UK, to showcase the new plane for US service members during a stopover on the way home from the NATO summit.

title: Trump Says US May Strike Iran Again, Threatens New Blockade
title_cn: 特朗普称美国可能再次打击伊朗并威胁实施新封锁
summary:
President Donald Trump said the US would probably launch further strikes on Iran and could resume a blockade on the country’s ports, ratcheting up pressure on Tehran and raising the prospect of a return to all-out war. Trump spoke hours after the US launched strikes on Iran, with almost 40 fighter jets — F-35s, F-15s, F-16s and F/A-18s as well as drones — hitting targets with precision-guided weapons, according to a US official. The US earlier on Tuesday revoked a waiver that allowed Tehran to sell its oil globally, in response to attacks on ships in the Strait of Hormuz that it blamed on the Islamic Republic. The moves posed the greatest threat yet to a ceasefire deal between the US and Iran and talks toward a broader agreement to end the war.

Bloomberg's Oliver Crook and Jeff Mason join Joe Mathieu on Balance of Power to discuss. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: How a Man Wearing a Trash Can May Expose Farage’s Weakness
title_cn: 一个戴着垃圾桶的男人如何暴露法拉奇的弱点
summary: Nigel Farage intended his shock decision to quit Parliament and seek reelection in his coastal seat as a demonstration of political strength. But a man wearing a trash can could end up showing the depth of antipathy to the Reform UK leader.

title: Trump Hails Iran War As a Success, Not Sure He Wants to Make a Deal
title_cn: 特朗普称赞伊朗战争取得成功，但不确定他是否想达成协议
summary: "The Iran war has been a tremendous military success," US President Donald Trump says during a news conference at the 2026 NATO Summit in Ankara, Turkey. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump Says US May Strike Iran Again, Threatens New Blockade
title_cn: 特朗普称美国可能再次打击伊朗并威胁实施新封锁
summary: President Donald Trump said the US would probably launch further strikes on Iran and could resume a blockade on the country’s ports, ratcheting up pressure on Tehran and raising the prospect of a return to all-out war.

title: New York City Looks to Make Buses Faster With Priority Lanes
title_cn: 纽约市希望通过优先车道让公交车更快
summary: New York state and city officials are working to increase the speed of public buses, with a goal of cutting riders’ travel times by up to six minutes on about 50 priority routes.

title: Trump Says NATO Summit Was Successful
title_cn: 特朗普称北约峰会取得成功
summary: US President Donald Trump says the 2026 NATO Summit in Ankara, Turkey, was successful. He also praises Turkish President Recep Tayyip Erdogan and NATO Secretary General Mark Rutte. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump’s Iran Ceasefire Was Built on Falsehoods
title_cn: 特朗普的伊朗停火是建立在谎言之上的
summary: The war Trump launched against Iran in February didn’t end in the victory he has claimed. Nor did the ceasefire terms he agreed to represent Iran’s “unconditional surrender.” They were anything but, Bloomberg Opinion columnist Marc Champion says. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Graham Platner Still Has Some Leverage Over Democrats, Strategist Says
title_cn: 策略师称格雷厄姆·普拉特纳对民主党仍有一定影响力
summary: Bill Scher, Politics Editor for the Washington Monthly and longtime Democratic political strategist and commentator, says Graham Platner's refusal to leave Maine's Senate race could force Democrats into a "game of chicken" before a candidate deadline. He says the party still has a chance against Republican Senator Susan Collins, but only if it unifies around an alternative. He speaks with Kailey Leinz and Joe Mathieu on the late edition of Bloomberg's "Balance of Power." (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Key Takeaways From NATO Summit: Talks Revolve Around Donald Trump
title_cn: 北约峰会的主要要点：会谈围绕唐纳德·特朗普展开
summary: NATO leaders gathered in Ankara this week aiming to impress Donald Trump with a raft of defense contracts and spending plans. The idea was to demonstrate to the US president their commitment to upgrading their militaries.

title: US to Remove Syria From Terrorism Sanctions List, Trump Says
title_cn: 特朗普称美国将把叙利亚从恐怖主义制裁名单中删除
summary: President Trump told reporters that he would remove Syria from the terrorism sanctions list during a bilat meeting with President Ahmed al-Sharaa of Syria during the NATO summit in Turkey. Trump praised the work al-Sharaa has done since he took power in 2024, saying 'he’s done a great job' with the country in the aftermath of its civil war. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Rahm Emanuel Says US Should End Unconditional Support for Israel
title_cn: 拉姆·伊曼纽尔表示美国应停止对以色列的无条件支持
summary: Rahm Emanuel, a long-time Democratic supporter of Israel exploring a presidential run, warned Israel that it’s become a “pariah” under Prime Minister Benjamin Netanyahu and said Washington should end unconditional support for its longtime ally.

title: European Parliament Blocks Move to Strip Soybeans of Renewable Status
title_cn: 欧洲议会阻止剥夺大豆的可再生地位
summary: The European Parliament blocked a move to strip soy-based biofuels of their renewable status, which would have phased out their contribution to European Union renewable energy targets by 2030.

title: Hungary Outlines Budget Milestones After Deficit Narrows
title_cn: 匈牙利概述了赤字缩小后的预算里程碑
summary: Hungary’s government outlined its next steps for tackling one of the biggest fiscal challenges in the European Union, having narrowed the shortfall in the first full month after taking office.

title: US Troop Withdrawal 'Will Not Be Drastic' Says NATO Military Committee Chair
title_cn: 北约军事委员会主席表示美军“不会大幅撤军”
summary: Chair of the NATO Military Committee Admiral Giuseppe Cavo Dragone says they will be unaffected by the withdrawal of US troops, and believes the transition will be smooth. He spoke to Bloomberg Television's Oliver Crook on the sidelines of the NATO Summit in Ankara on Wednesday. (Source: Bloomberg)

title: Trump: US to Remove Syria From Terrorism Sanctions List
title_cn: 特朗普：美国将把叙利亚从恐怖主义制裁名单中删除
summary: President Donald Trump said the US would remove Syria from the terrorism sanctions list. “I think I will. Why wouldn’t I? He’s done a great job,” Trump said Wednesday during a bilateral meeting with Syrian President Ahmed al-Sharaa on the sidelines of the NATO summit in Ankara, Turkey. (Source: Bloomberg)
